## Testing

<!-- How did you verify this change works? Check the boxes that apply and
     add commands/notes as needed. -->

- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes
- [ ] `pnpm tsc --noEmit` passes
- [ ] `pnpm test:coverage` passes (90% threshold)
- [ ] `pnpm e2e` passes locally (if this touches `src/contents/`, `src/background.ts`, or extension messaging)
- [ ] Manually verified in Chrome (`pnpm build` + load unpacked), if applicable
- [ ] Added/updated tests for the behavior change
- [ ] Updated docs (`README.md` / `README.ja.md` / `docs/output-spec.md`) if user-facing behavior or output format changed
